Goodyear-owned commercial truck tire and service center on Burr Street in Gary, next to the Burr Street travel-center cluster off I-80/94 (Borman), near the I-65 northern terminus. Commercial tire sales, mounting and service.

Southern Tire Mart commercial truck tire and truck-care center co-located at the Pilot Travel Center on Burr Street in Gary; offers commercial tires and DOT inspections. Near I-80/94 (Borman) and the I-65 northern terminus.

Long-established commercial, industrial and OTR truck tire dealer in Gary offering tire sales, recapping, foam-fill and road service across Northwest Indiana. Located in central Gary near the I-65 north terminus / Broadway corridor.

Independent semi-truck tire shop in the Miller section of Gary offering new/used tires, mounting, repair, regrooving, retreading and light mechanical work. Sits just off US-12/20 near I-80/94 and the Indiana Toll Road, east of the I-65 northern terminus.

Business Name: Truck Wash at Pilot Travel Center (Burr Street, Gary)
Description: The Pilot Travel Center on Burr Street in Gary lists an on-site truck wash among its amenities. Located off I-80/94 (Borman) near the I-65 northern terminus.

Business Name: TA Truck Service at Petro Gary
Description: TA Truck Service full-service repair shop co-located at the Petro Gary stopping center (Grant Street), offering heavy-duty truck repair and 24-hour roadside assistance at the I-65 northern terminus / I-80/94 (Borman) interchange.

Business Name: TA Truck Service at TA Gary
Description: TA Truck Service repair facility (6 bays) co-located at TA Gary on Burr Street, offering heavy-duty truck repair and roadside assistance near the I-80/94 (Borman) interchange and the I-65 northern terminus.

Love's Speedco truck-service center in Gary providing oil/lube and preventive maintenance, commercial tire service, light mechanical work and emergency roadside assistance. Located in the Gary freight hub near I-80/94 and the I-65 northern terminus.

Established Merrillville towing company (since 1967) offering towing and accident/collision cleanup for Lake County, on Broadway near I-65 Exit 253 (US-30). Note: primarily light and medium-duty towing with limited weekday hours.

Business Name: Gary Mobile On-Site Truck & Trailer Repair
Description: Mobile truck and trailer repair / 24-7 roadside service advertised for Gary and the surrounding NW Indiana corridor (engine, brakes, suspension, roadside).
Interstate hotel off I-65 near US-30 (Exit 253) in Merrillville whose official listing advertises free outdoor parking including truck and bus parking.

24-hour Walmart Supercenter near I-65 Exit 253 (US-30/Broadway area) that is commonly used for overnight truck parking, though space is limited and permission is at the store's discretion. Drivers should call ahead.

Description: Fenced and gated reservable truck/trailer parking lot at Golden Group Properties in western Gary with guard and camera surveillance, in the freight hub near I-80/94 (Borman) and the I-65 northern terminus. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.
Fenced reservable truck/trailer parking lot in western Gary with an on-site mechanic shop, in the freight hub near I-80/94 and the I-65 northern terminus. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.
Gravel, fenced 24/7 reservable truck/trailer parking lot in Gary off Chase Street, near the Grant Street travel-center cluster and the I-65 northern terminus. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.
Reservable truck/trailer parking lot in Merrillville off Cleveland Street, in the I-65 Exit 253 (US-30) area. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.

Reservable 90+ space truck, trailer and fleet parking facility in Hammond, in the far-northwest Borman/Chicago-line freight area served off I-80/94 and I-90 near the I-65 corridor's NW terminus connection. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.

24/7 fenced and gated reservable truck parking in Hammond (south of I-90, north of I-94), in the far-northwest freight/IL-state-line area near the I-65 corridor's NW terminus connection. Bookable via Truck Parking Club.

Indiana State Police weigh/inspection station on I-65 southbound near Lowell (approximately mile marker 243, just north of the SR-2/Exit 240 area) in Lake County; accepts PrePass. The former northbound station at this location is abandoned.
